headline: Nxera Pharma to Receive US$10 Million Milestone Payment from AbbVie under Collaboration Targeting Neurological Diseases
summary: This marks the fourth R&D milestone achieved under the collaboration, and the second in 2026, reflecting the steady progress of development under the collaborationUnder the terms of the agreement, Nxera is eligible to receive up to US$1.2 billion in potential option, development and commercial milestones, in addition to tiered royalties based on sales Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge and London, UK, 30 June 2026 – Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd.
